name: vcmusic-pwa
description: Aggregator Musik Viral PWA & Android App

scripts.build: mkdir -p public && (cp -rf assets public/ || echo 'no assets') && (cp -rf blog public/ || echo 'no blog') && cp index.html app.js style.css sw.js manifest.json robots.txt sitemap.xml app-ads.txt ads.txt public/ && (cp *.html public/ || true) && (cp vcmusic.apk public/ || true)
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap-init: npx cap init VCMusic com.vcsound.app --web-dir dist

author: VCMusic Team
